mapper.select: /* rcpMgmtMapper.getDelayOpenList */ SELECT DISTINCT NVL(B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, B.CSTMR_TEL_FN || B.CSTMR_TEL_MN || B.CSTMR_TEL_RN) AS cstmrMobile FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND A.PSTATE = '00' AND A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '00' AND TRUNC(A.REQ_IN_DAY) = TRUNC(NVL(A.RVISN_DTTM, A.REQ_IN_DAY)) AND TRUNC(A.REQ_IN_DAY) = TRUNC(SYSDATE - 4) AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = C.CD_VAL AND C.GRP_ID = 'RCP0072' AND C.USG_YN = 'Y'
